title: Expedition Return System
description: During safe passage windows, expedition members may return from the fog. Returnees might not be from the most recent expedition - they could be from expeditions sent decades or centuries ago. Some may not speak recognizable languages. Survivors spread rumors of gold spires, tongue-whipping deer, cliff runes only the mad can read, razor grass, and faceless warm statues.
definition-of-done: System generates returning expedition members with varied temporal origins, conditions, and rumors. Rumors affect market speculation and company valuations.
testing-plan: Verify returnees generate with appropriate temporal origins. Test rumor generation and propagation. Verify rumors affect game economy.
unknowns: How rumors should mechanically affect the game
Balance of helpful vs misleading rumors
